eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Woodward, OK; at 03:56 PM ON FEB 17, 2026 Effective until 05:56 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
At 1544  a large and destructive wildfire was burning out of control southeast of the City of Woodward  spreading rapidly to the northeast. Wildfires can damage or destroy structures and can harm or kill people and animals. For your safety EVACUATE IMMEDIATELY for the Mooreland or Vici Community Center. Those between 13th street and 48th street  and Oklahoma Avenue and Hanks Trail should LEAVE this area NOW to avoid injury or death. Do not delay to pack belongings. The Reunification Center is setting up at the Mooreland or Vici Community Center.
Roads in the area may be impacted by fire and smoke. Never drive into heavy smoke. SLOW DOWN & MOVE OVER for emergency vehicles.
